recommendations.title: House of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Deranged scientist, Gustav Niemann, escapes from prison and overtakes the director of a traveling chamber of horrors, soon reviving the infamous Count Dracula, the frozen Frankenstein Monster, and the Wolf Man.

recommendations.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Frankenstein's unscrupulous colleague, Dr. Bohmer, plans to transplant Ygor's brain so he can rule the world using the monster's body, but the plan goes sour when he turns malevolent and goes on a rampage.

recommendations.title: House of Dracula
recommendations.overview: A scientist working on cures for rare afflictions, such as a bone softening agent made from molds to allow him to correct the spinal deformity of his nurse, finds the physical causes of lycanthropy in wolf-man Larry Talbot and of vampirism in Count D

recommendations.title: Real Steel
recommendations.overview: Charlie Kenton is a washed-up fighter who retired from the ring when robots took over the sport. After his robot is trashed, he reluctantly teams up with his estranged son to rebuild and train an unlikely contender.

recommendations.title: Re-Animator
recommendations.overview: Conducting clandestine experiments within the morgue at Miskatonic University, scientist Herbert West reveals to a fellow graduate student his groundbreaking work concerning the re-animation of fresh corpses.

recommendations.title: Demon Seed
recommendations.overview: A scientist creates Proteus, an organic supercomputer with artificial intelligence which becomes obsessed with human beings, and in particular the creator's wife.

recommendations.title: Blade
recommendations.overview: The Daywalker known as "Blade" - a half-vampire, half-mortal man - becomes the protector of humanity against an underground army of vampires.

recommendations.title: Return of the Fly
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after his father's experiments with matter transmission fail, Philippe Delambre and his uncle François attempt to create a matter transmission device on their own. However, their experiments have disastrous results, turning Philippe int

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: An American tourist and a troubled young woman are chased by her gang leader brother to a top secret British government facility that conducts experiments on children.

recommendations.title: SS Experiment Love Camp
recommendations.overview: Near the end of WW2, prisoners of war are used in experiments to perfect the Arian race.
